top_signals.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs extend negative streak, following $2.4 billion monthly outflows in May
top_signals.summary: Dampened hopes for an improved macroeconomic environment have led institutions to move from crypto ETFs to AI stocks, an analyst said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New Gulf Coast Shipyard Sports 660-ton Marine Travelift
top_signals.summary: Taylor Marine Construction, Inc. announced the startup of Taylor Marine Shipyard, a new Gulf Coast commercial vessel repair and haul-out facility positioned on Dickinson Bayou, immediately adjacent to the Houston Ship Channel near Lights 45 and 46.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea overtakes India as world’s sixth-largest stock market
top_signals.summary: Memory chipmakers Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix have powered the country's equity surge.
